subject: Quote request – Annual seminar 200 people – October 2026
body:
Bonjour,

Je me permets de vous contacter suite à la recommandation de l'un de vos clients, Mme Chen de Nexora Group.

Nous organisons notre séminaire annuel pour environ 200 personnes et souhaitons obtenir un devis pour l'événement suivant :

- Type : Séminaire annuel (plénière + ateliers)
- Date souhaitée : 15 octobre 2026
- Durée : 2 jours
- Nombre de participants : 200 personnes
- Lieu souhaité : Paris ou région parisienne, salle moderne avec équipements AV complets
- Besoins : salle plénière, 4 salles d'ateliers, déjeuner assis les deux jours, cocktail dînatoire le soir du premier jour
- Budget indicatif : environ 80 000 €

Pourriez-vous nous faire parvenir une proposition détaillée incluant les prestations traiteur, l'audiovisuel et la logistique ?

En vous remerciant par avance,
Sophie Marchand
Directrice des Ressources Humaines
Nexora Group
Tél : +33 1 40 00 01 02

subject: Product launch event – London – March 2027
body:
Dear Event Pulse team,

I'm reaching out to enquire about organising our product launch event in London.

Details:
- Event type: Product launch with press & VIP guests
- Preferred date: March 2027 (exact date TBC)
- Expected attendance: 300–350 guests
- Venue preference: iconic London venue, preferably with outdoor terrace
- Requirements: full AV setup, catering (cocktail style), photography & live streaming

Please note we have a strict NDA requirement for all suppliers.

Could you provide an initial proposal?

Kind regards,
James Miller
Head of Marketing – Brightline Events

subject: Cotización – Gala anual – Madrid – Noviembre 2026
body:
Buenos días,

Les escribo para solicitar cotización para nuestra gala anual de empresa.

Detalles del evento:
- Tipo: Gala de empresa con cena de gala y entrega de premios
- Fecha: viernes 20 de noviembre de 2026
- Invitados: 450 personas
- Ciudad: Madrid, preferiblemente un espacio emblemático
- Necesidades: cena sentada (5 platos), música en directo, sonido y luces profesionales, fotografía

Nota: algunos invitados son vegetarianos (aprox. 15%) y tenemos varios invitados con alergias al gluten.

Quedamos a su disposición para cualquier consulta.

Atentamente,
Carlos Ruiz
Director General – Apex Dynamics

subject: Incentive trip event – Jodhpur – February 2027
body:
Hello,

We are planning an exclusive incentive trip for our top 120 performers and their spouses (approx. 240 guests total) to Jodhpur, India.

We would like to organise a gala dinner at a royal palace venue, with traditional Rajasthani entertainment.

Requirements:
- Gala dinner for 240 persons at Umaid Bhawan Palace
- Traditional music and dance performance
- Transportation from airport to venue and back
- Welcome cocktail
- Professional photography

Please provide a detailed quote.

Best regards,
Priya Sharma
VP Human Resources – Sapphire Hotels

subject: Conference & Awards – Stockholm – September 2026
body:
Hi there,

Nordic Ventures is planning its annual conference and awards ceremony for around 500 attendees.

Date: September 18, 2026
Location: Stockholm
Needs: Full-day conference setup + gala evening with awards, AV, catering, live band

Our CEO will be presenting awards to 20 categories – we need a professional stage setup.

Could you send a preliminary proposal?

Best,
Erik Lindqvist

subject: Quote request – Conference Accra – July 2026
body:
Bonjour,

Meridian Bank souhaite organiser une conférence internationale à Accra pour 300 participants.

Date envisagée : 8 juillet 2026
Lieu : Accra International Conference Centre
Besoins :
- Salle plénière équipée
- Interprétation simultanée (anglais / français / haoussa)
- Déjeuner buffet 2 jours
- Cocktail de clôture
- Hébergement pour 50 délégués étrangers (2 nuits)

Merci de nous transmettre un devis global.

Cordialement,
Amara Osei
Directeur des Relations Institutionnelles – Meridian Bank

subject: Corporate party – Copenhagen – December 2026
body:
Hello Event Pulse,

We're looking for a partner to organise our annual Christmas party.

~250 employees
Date: 12 December 2026
Venue: Bella Center or similar in Copenhagen
We want: dinner + DJ + entertainment, open bar

Budget: around 80,000 DKK all-inclusive.

Please advise.

Lena Petersen
Office Manager – Mirage Entertainment

subject: Desert Gala – Dubai – January 2027
body:
Good morning,

Dune Properties wishes to organise an exclusive desert gala for 500 VIP clients and partners.

Location: Al Marmoom Desert, Dubai
Date: January 15, 2027
Expected guests: 500
Requirements: luxury desert setup, international catering, traditional entertainment + DJ, helicopter arrival for 20 top VIPs, fireworks finale

This is a very high-profile event. Budget is not a constraint – quality is paramount.

Please contact me to discuss.

Farrukh Tashkentov
CEO – Dune Properties
+971 4 123 4567

subject: Evento corporativo – Rio de Janeiro – Agosto 2026
body:
Olá,

A Luminar Health está planejando um evento corporativo para lançamento de produto no Rio de Janeiro.

Detalhes:
- Data: 22 de agosto de 2026
- Local: Museu do Amanhã ou equivalente
- Convidados: 350 pessoas
- Formato: coquetel + apresentação de produto + jantar

Pedimos proposta detalhada com opções de buffet e audiovisual.

Atenciosamente,
Ana Paula Costa
Marketing Director – Luminar Health

subject: Anfrage – Jahreskonferenz München – Oktober 2026
body:
Guten Tag,

Wir möchten unsere Jahreskonferenz mit 600 Teilnehmern in München organisieren.

Datum: 5.–6. Oktober 2026
Ort: BMW Welt oder vergleichbare Location
Bedarf: Plenum, Workshops, Catering (2 Tage), Abendgala
Budget: ca. 150.000 €

Bitte senden Sie uns ein detailliertes Angebot.

Mit freundlichen Grüßen,
Thomas Müller
Veranstaltungsleiter – Blackrock Events

body: Hi, we'd like a quote for a gala dinner for 180 people in Milan in September 2026. Formal setting, live music, full catering. Thanks.

body: Hola, buscamos presupuesto para una gala para 400 invitados en Buenos Aires, noviembre 2026. Teatro Colón sería ideal.

subject: Conference – Seoul 2026
body: Hello, COEX Grand Ballroom for 500 attendees. Full-day conference + dinner. September 2026. Please quote.

subject: Congress – Paris
body: Bonjour, congrès professionnel pour 600 personnes à Paris. 3 jours, octobre 2026. Besoin de traducteurs et d'un traiteur de qualité.

subject: Conference – Melbourne
body: Hi, we need a full-day conference setup for 400 people at Crown Melbourne. March 2027. AV + catering + photography.

subject: Event – Ho Chi Minh City
body: Chào, chúng tôi cần báo giá tổ chức hội nghị cho 300 người tại GEM Center, tháng 9/2026. Catering + AV + phiên dịch.

subject: RE: Seminar CTR-2026-100 – Increase in number of attendees
body:
Bonjour,

Suite à notre validation en interne, le nombre de participants pour notre séminaire (CTR-2026-100) a été revu à la hausse.

Nous passons de 200 à 230 personnes. Pourriez-vous mettre à jour le devis et confirmer que la salle reste adaptée ?

Merci,
Sophie

subject: CTR-2026-101 – Additional AV requirements
body:
Hi,

Regarding our product launch (contract CTR-2026-101), we'd like to add live streaming capabilities and a 6x3m LED screen.

Can you provide the additional cost?

Thanks,
James

subject: Gala CTR-2026-102 – Cambio en el menú
body:

Para nuestra gala (ref. CTR-2026-102), necesitamos añadir una opción de menú sin gluten para 30 personas adicionales que acaban de confirmar su asistencia.

¿Puede actualizar el presupuesto?

Saludos,
Carlos

subject: Conference CTR-2026-105 – Adding interpreters
body:

Pour notre conférence de juillet (CTR-2026-105), nous devons ajouter une 4ème langue d'interprétation : le portugais.

Y a-t-il un surcoût ? Pouvez-vous confirmer la disponibilité des interprètes ?

Cordialement,
Amara

body:

We've had an internal decision to change the venue for our conference (CTR-2026-104) from Stockholmsmässan to Drottningholm Palace Garden Stage for a more prestigious setting.

Would this change our quote significantly?

Best,
Erik

subject: CTR-2026-103 – Extra guests & helicopter
body:
Hello,

Two updates for our Jodhpur incentive (CTR-2026-103):

1. Guest count increases from 240 to 260 (add 20 dinner covers + transport)
2. We need helicopter transfer for our top 20 VIPs from Jodhpur airport to the palace

Please update the quote accordingly.

Best regards,
Priya

subject: Modification – Zusätzliche Gäste
body:
Hallo,

Wir haben leider vergessen, die Referenznummer anzugeben, aber bei unserem Münchner Event müssen wir 30 zusätzliche Gäste hinzufügen.

Könnten Sie das bitte berücksichtigen und das Angebot aktualisieren?

Freundliche Grüße,
Thomas Müller

(PS: Ich weiß nicht genau welche Veranstaltungsreferenz – ich meine die Konferenz im Oktober)

subject: Vores arrangement – ændring
body:
Hej,

Vi ønsker at ændre cateringen for vores arrangement. Vi vil gerne have et vegansk menupunkt til ca. 20 gæster.

Vi har to events hos jer – det er det i december, vi taler om.

Venlig hilsen,
Lena Petersen

subject: Change request – Desert event
body:
Hello,

Please note that for the desert gala I've been in discussion with your team, we'd like to upgrade the fireworks from standard to a 15-minute premium show.

Also: please add 50 more guests (total now 550).

We have two events planned with your agency – I'm referring to the January 2027 one.

Farrukh

subject: Changement de date
body:
Bonjour,

Je souhaite décaler notre événement d'une semaine en raison d'un conflit d'agenda de notre PDG.

Pouvez-vous vérifier la disponibilité du lieu et me confirmer si cela est possible sans frais ?

Merci,
Nathalie

(Je n'ai pas le numéro de contrat sous la main – c'est l'événement de Lyon)

subject: Additional request – our event
body:
Hello,

Quick note – for the awards night we've discussed, could you add a photobooth and a same-day video edit (3-minute after-movie)?

We also want to increase catering by 40 covers.

Many thanks,
Charlotte
(Sterling Banquet – I believe we have two bookings with you)

subject: Modification needed
body:
Hi team,

Just a quick update – we need to bump the guest count by 25 for our dinner event. Also, can we add drone filming?

Please update the quote when you get a chance.

Kevin

subject: Guest list update – Cape Town dinner
body:

We have 30 additional guests confirmed for our event. I'm not sure which contract number this falls under but it's the Cape Town dinner in December.

Kind regards,
Rashida

subject: Cambio – evento Barcelona
body:
Hola,

Queremos añadir un servicio de autobuses lanzadera desde el centro de Barcelona al evento. Serían 4 autobuses de 50 plazas.

Disculpa no tengo el número de contrato a mano.

Diego

subject: Prefectural permit – Parc Floral – Reminder
body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Please be reminded that the prefectural permit for any event of more than 500 people at Parc Floral must be submitted 45 working days before the event date.

Kindly take this into account in your planning.

Best regards,
Events Department – City of Paris

subject: Confirmation – Ballroom reservation – CTR-2026-128
body:
Dear Event Pulse,

This is to confirm that the Grand Ballroom is reserved for your event on the agreed dates.

Please note that due to a high-profile private function on the adjacent terrace, access to the northern exit will be restricted until 21:00.

Kind regards,
Events Coordinator – Atlantis The Palm

subject: Setup schedule – Hall A – CTR-2026-132
body:
Dear Event Pulse team,

Please find below the setup schedule for Hall A.

Loading bay access: D-1 from 08:00 to 20:00
Setup day: D-1 from 06:00 to 23:00
Event day: from 08:00 to 22:00

Please confirm receipt.

Best regards,
Operations – Tokyo International Forum

subject: Orange alert – Strong winds – Île-de-France – Weekend May 16-17
body:
Hello,

Météo-France issues an orange weather alert for strong winds in the Île-de-France region for the weekend of May 16–17, 2026.

Expected gusts: 70 to 90 km/h.
Risk to lightweight structures and tents.

Please consult your risk management plan.

Météo-France

subject: Venue briefing – Concert Hall – CTR-2026-147
body:

Warm regards,
Events Team – Sydney Opera House

body: Dobrý den, hledáme organizátora pro naši mezinárodní konferenci v Praze. 500 účastníků, říjen 2026. Kongresové centrum Praha. Kompletní AV + catering + ubytování.

subject: Suite – Séminaire CTR-2026-100 – Menu végétarien
body: Bonjour, un détail supplémentaire pour notre séminaire (CTR-2026-100) : nous avons 18 participants végétariens et 3 avec une allergie aux noix. Merci de l'indiquer au traiteur.

subject: CTR-2026-101 – Security upgrade
body: Hi, for our product launch (CTR-2026-101), our PR team requires a 2-person security detail at the entrance. Can you add that to the quote? Thanks.

subject: CTR-2026-102 – Photobooth request
body: Hola, nos gustaría añadir un photobooth interactivo a nuestra gala (ref CTR-2026-102). ¿Está disponible y cuál sería el coste adicional? Gracias.

subject: CTR-2026-103 – Drone request
body: Hello, can we add drone filming to our Jodhpur incentive event (CTR-2026-103)? We'd love aerial footage of the palace arrival. Please advise on cost.

subject: CTR-2026-104 – Translation request
body: Hi, we'll need English-Swedish simultaneous interpretation for our Stockholm conference (CTR-2026-104). Please add 2 interpreters to the quote.

subject: CTR-2026-105 – Date change
body: Dear team, we need to shift our Accra conference (CTR-2026-105) from July 8 to July 15, 2026. Please confirm venue availability and any cost impact.

subject: Modification gala Cracovie
body: Bonjour, concernant notre gala à Cracovie, nous souhaitons ajouter un service de navette depuis l'hôtel principal pour 80 personnes. Merci de chiffrer.

subject: Seoul launch – extra AV
body: Hi, for our Seoul product launch, we'd like to add a 4K video wall (9x5m) and drone coverage of the venue. Please update the quote.

subject: Dublin conference – accommodation update
body: Hi, we now need accommodation for 95 speakers instead of 80. Can you update the room block? Same hotel preferred. Thanks, Helen.

subject: Nairobi – extra security
body: Hello, given the high-profile nature of our conference, we'd like to add a 4-person security team including one coordinator. Please advise on cost.

subject: Genève – ajout bien-être
body: Bonjour, pour notre séminaire stratégique de Genève, nous souhaitons ajouter une session de yoga matinale et un massage assis de 10 min pour chaque participant. Est-ce faisable ?

subject: Oslo gala – band upgrade
body: Hei, vi ønsker å oppgradere fra DJ til en liveband med 5 musikere for vår Oslo-gala. Hva er prisdifferansen?

subject: Gala Berne – ajout vin
body: Bonjour, nous souhaitons ajouter une sélection de vins suisses rares en dégustation avant le dîner. 30 minutes, sommelier inclus. Merci de chiffrer.

subject: Kilkenny – auction setup
body: Hi, we need to add a professional auction setup (podium, screen for item display, auctioneer mic) to our Kilkenny gala. Can you arrange that?

subject: Venezia – gondola transfer
body: Buongiorno, vorremmo aggiungere un trasferimento in gondola per 30 VIP dall'hotel alla sede dell'evento. È possibile? Qual è il costo indicativo?

subject: Access update – CTR-2026-112
body: Dear Event Pulse, please note that the South Gate will be closed for restoration work during your event dates. All vehicles must use the North Gate. Please inform your suppliers. Regards, Blenheim Events.

subject: Unavailability periods – May 2026
body: Dear service provider, please note that the Palais des Festivals will be fully reserved from May 12 to 23, 2026. No third-party event may be organised during this period.

subject: Venue confirmation – CTR-2026-138
body: Dear Event Pulse, this is to confirm reservation of Hall 98 for your event. Loading access confirmed from D-2. Air conditioning system will be fully operational by setup day. Best regards, BITEC Operations.

subject: Weather advisory – outdoor events next 14 days
body: This is an automated weather digest for event planning. Several outdoor venues in Europe and the Middle East may be affected by adverse conditions in the coming 14 days. Please review your upcoming outdoor events and assess contingency plans.

subject: Booking confirmation – CTR-2026-119
body: Dear partner, we confirm the booking of the Concert Hall for the planned event. Please note that confetti and smoke special effects are not permitted. Thank you for your understanding.

subject: VIP arrival protocol – CTR-2026-129
body: Dear Event Pulse team, for your VIP event, please note that all guest vehicles must be pre-registered 72 hours in advance. We also recommend a dedicated welcome ambassador for your group. Let us know if you need assistance.

subject: Security briefing – CTR-2026-143
body: Dear partners, as a reminder, all event participants must pass through security screening. No photography is permitted in the St George Hall during the private event. Please brief your guests accordingly.

subject: Load-in schedule confirmed
body: Dear Event Pulse, load-in for your event is confirmed for D-1 from 07:00. Please ensure all supplier vehicles have a valid delivery permit. Parking is available on Level P2.

subject: Noise curfew notice
body: Dear team, please note that Crown Melbourne enforces a noise curfew of 11pm on weekdays and 11:30pm on weekends. Live amplified music must cease 30 minutes before curfew. Please plan your entertainment schedule accordingly.

subject: Alerte sécurité – dispositif renforcé – mai 2026
body: Chers clients, en raison d'un sommet international prévu à proximité, un dispositif de sécurité renforcé sera en place du 18 au 22 mai. Des délais supplémentaires sont à prévoir aux accès. Merci de votre compréhension.

subject: Fermeture Grand Prix – dates bloquées
body: Chers partenaires, nous vous rappelons que le circuit de Monaco sera fermé à toute circulation du 22 au 28 mai 2026 pour le Grand Prix de Monaco. Tous les événements dans le secteur du port devront être reportés ou adaptés.

subject: Sound check schedule – CTR-2026-134
body: Dear Event Pulse, your sound check at the Katara Amphitheatre is confirmed for 15:00 on event eve. The venue technical team will be present. Note that prayer times must be respected (no amplified sound during Maghrib).

subject: Venue access – CTR-2026-148
body: Dear partners, please be informed that the main entrance of ICE Kraków will be under minor renovation. Guest access will be via the west entrance. Adequate signage will be in place.
